text:
Once upon a time in a small, lush forest clear, little Tommy Tiger lived happily with his family.

One sunny morning, after a playful chase among the leaves, Tommy looked back and saw his mom teaching daddy how to glide through the tree branches like a flying squirrel. They both paused to admire their shadow on the ground. Tommy giggled.

Later, when mommy bird was busy nesting, daddy took Tommy on an adventure to find wild berries. As they cautiously picked their way through the woodland, they heard a distant bird song.

They continued until they stumbled upon a serene glade bathed in sunlight. At the center, a flock of brilliant peacocks fluttered their splendid feathers. Startled, they scattered, leaving only their beautiful plumes scattered about.

Tommy looked at daddy, eyes wide. "Do peacocks fight?" he asked quietly.

"Daddy says they don't. They're just beautiful birds," said daddy, his voice affectionate.

After a moment of contemplation
